completed_tasks.name: Fix horizontal freeze detection for side-input subtrees + fix vertical band allocation (freeze_block_sizes)

remaining_tasks.name: Confirm horizontal + vertical layout fixes pass live Nuke UAT

blockers.description: Live Nuke UAT required — two root-cause bugs fixed this session but not yet confirmed in Nuke

human_actions_pending.action: Test Layout Selected Horizontal with frozen nodes that are side inputs of spine nodes
human_actions_pending.context: Bug 1 root cause: _expand_scope_for_freeze_groups only scanned selected (spine) nodes — frozen blocks in side-input subtrees were never detected. Fix: preliminary spine walk in _layout_selected_horizontal_impl collects side-input subtrees for freeze detection. node_layout.py uncommitted.

human_actions_pending.action: Test Layout Selected (vertical) with frozen nodes — check that other subtrees are spaced correctly above the block
human_actions_pending.context: Bug 2 root cause: compute_dims treated freeze block root as a leaf (non-root members excluded from node_filter), returning only root.screenHeight(). Vertical band was too small; non-root members above root collided with nodes in bands above. Fix: freeze_block_sizes dict overrides leaf dims for block roots in compute_dims/place_subtree. node_layout.py uncommitted.

decisions.decision: Horizontal detection scope widened to include side-input subtrees of preliminary spine
decisions.rationale: Frozen blocks living entirely in side-input subtrees (not selected by user) have no selected nodes with freeze UUIDs, so the original single-pass expand never found them. Preliminary spine walk collects those subtrees for detection without adding them to selected_nodes/spine_set.

decisions.decision: freeze_block_sizes = {id(root): (root.screenWidth(), block_bounding_box_height)} overrides compute_dims leaf dims
decisions.rationale: Width is kept at root.screenWidth() to avoid horizontal displacement side effects. Only the height is overridden with the full block bounding box height (max_y - min_y) to give place_subtree a correctly sized vertical band.

next_action: Commit node_layout.py with the two fixes, then ask user to test horizontal and vertical layout with frozen nodes in a fresh Nuke session. If both pass, ask about push to remote.
context_notes: Phase 16 is the final phase of v1.3 Freeze Layout milestone. 335/335 CI tests pass. Two root-cause bugs fixed this session: (1) horizontal freeze detection missed side-input freeze groups — fixed by widening detection scope in _layout_selected_horizontal_impl with a preliminary spine walk; (2) vertical layout allocated too-small bands for freeze block roots because compute_dims returned only root.screenHeight() — fixed by adding freeze_block_sizes parameter to compute_dims and place_subtree, passed from layout_selected. Both fixes are minimal and backward-compatible (freeze_block_sizes=None by default).
